zh_HANS: 轻松文本输入&字体管理

msgid: Easy text input & font management with a viewport floating toolbar.
zh_HANS: 轻松文本输入与字体管理，含视口浮动工具栏。

msgid: New columns grow from right to left
New columns grow from left to right
Type horizontally; press Enter to start a new column

zh_HANS: 横向输入 · 回车换列

msgid: Shorter columns are auto-padded to stay aligned
zh_HANS: 较短列会自动补全角空格以保持对齐

msgid: Right to Left: first line is the rightmost column; Enter adds leftward
zh_HANS: 从右到左：第一行在最右列，回车向左新增列

msgid: Left to Right: first line is the leftmost column; Enter adds rightward
zh_HANS: 从左到右：第一行在最左列，回车向右新增列
非等宽字体 — 竖列可能对不齐

msgid: Convert halfwidth characters to fullwidth for better CJK alignment
zh_HANS: 将半角字符转为全角，以改善中文排版对齐
没有可转换的半角字符
已修复 {:d} 个半角字符

msgid: New columns appear to the left
New columns appear to the right
Blank line between columns starts a new column
zh_HANS: 列与列之间的空行表示换列

msgid: Vertical: one character per line; blank line = new column
zh_HANS: 竖向：每行一字；空一行表示换列

msgid: No layout frame — click Add Frame
zh_HANS: 尚无排版框 — 点击「添加框」

msgid: Create a layout frame automatically when adding new text
zh_HANS: 新建文字时自动创建排版框

msgid: Draw layout frame rectangles in the 3D viewport
zh_HANS: 在 3D 视口中绘制排版框矩形

msgid: Suggested height for the N-panel textbox (drag its bottom edge to resize)
zh_HANS: N 面板文本框建议高度（可拖动底边调整大小）

msgid: Maximum characters for N-panel multi-line text input (Blender hard cap is 50,000)
zh_HANS: N 面板多行文本输入的最大字符数（Blender 硬上限为 50,000）

msgid: Select a text object to edit.
zh_HANS: 选择文字对象以开始编辑。
打开 Text Helper 插件偏好设置

msgid: Show or hide the floating toolbar in the 3D viewport
zh_HANS: 显示或隐藏 3D 视口中的浮动工具栏
多行 N 面板编辑器（需 Blender 5.2+）

msgid: Floating toolbar near selected text in the viewport
zh_HANS: 视口中选中文字下方的浮动工具栏

msgid: Header toolbar in the 3D Viewport header
Style presets, alignment, and spacing controls
zh_HANS: 样式预设、对齐与间距控制

msgid: Select a text object or add a new one to start editing.
zh_HANS: 选择文字对象或新建一个开始编辑。
文本已截断至 {:d} 字（上限）
选中文字时自动显示浮动工具栏

msgid: Automatically display the floating toolbar when a text object is selected
zh_HANS: 选中文字对象时自动显示浮动工具栏

msgid: Shows below selected text in the 3D viewport
zh_HANS: 显示在 3D 视口中选中文字的下方

msgid: Display the floating text toolbar below the selected text in the 3D viewport
zh_HANS: 在 3D 视口中于选中文字下方显示浮动工具栏

msgid: Floating toolbar shown — look below the text in the 3D viewport
zh_HANS: 浮动工具栏已显示 — 请在 3D 视口中文字下方查看

msgid: Enable Floating Toolbar in add-on preferences
zh_HANS: 请在插件偏好设置中开启「浮动工具栏」

msgid: Distance from the top of the 3D viewport to the floating toolbar (pixels)
zh_HANS: 浮动工具栏距 3D 视口顶部的距离（像素）
视口 HUD 显示缩放

msgid: Accent color for the viewport HUD and pickers
zh_HANS: 视口 HUD 与选择面板的强调色

msgid: Match Blender interface theme colors (tool header)
zh_HANS: 与 Blender 界面主题一致（工具栏标题栏）
自定义 HUD 强调色

msgid: Could not add layout frame — select a text object with a 3D View open
zh_HANS: 无法添加排版框 — 请选中文字对象并确保已打开 3D 视口

msgid: Clear search text and restore sort, script filter, and filter chips to defaults
zh_HANS: 清空搜索并恢复排序、书写系统筛选和筛选芯片为默认值

msgid: Rescan system fonts and rebuild preview thumbnails
zh_HANS: 重新扫描系统字体并重建预览缩略图
筛选条件已还原为默认值

msgid: Rescan system font folders, clear failed-load caches, and rebuild font preview thumbnails
zh_HANS: 重新扫描系统字体、清除加载失败缓存并重建预览缩略图
找到 {:d} 个字体，正在重建预览

msgid: Apply this font to the selected text
zh_HANS: 将此字体应用到选中文字

msgid: Click refresh to load system fonts
zh_HANS: 点击刷新按钮加载系统字体

msgid: Type in search to narrow results…
zh_HANS: 继续在搜索框输入以缩小范围…

msgid: No matching fonts. Try turning off filters.
zh_HANS: 未匹配到字体，可尝试关闭筛选

msgid: Filter fonts by supported writing system
zh_HANS: 按字体支持的书写系统筛选

msgid: Sort order for the system font list
zh_HANS: 系统字体列表的排序方式

msgid: Show recently applied font families first
zh_HANS: 优先显示最近应用的字体族

msgid: How font names appear in lists and the viewport font picker
zh_HANS: 字体列表与视口字体选择器中的名称显示方式

msgid: How font files are merged into one family with multiple weights. OpenType uses the name-table family (matches Family Name display); File Name parses weight suffixes from file names (-Bold, -Light, etc.)
zh_HANS: 如何将多个字体文件合并为同一字族的多字重。OpenType 按名称表族名合并（与「族名」显示一致）；文件名则解析 -Bold、-Light 等后缀

msgid: Group by OpenType family name when available, otherwise parse the file name
zh_HANS: 优先按 OpenType 族名合并，无族名时回退到文件名解析

msgid: Prefer PostScript name prefix (e.g. GenYoGothic2), then OpenType family, then file name
zh_HANS: 优先 PostScript 前缀（如 GenYoGothic2），其次 OpenType 族名，最后文件名

msgid: Group by PostScript name before the last hyphen (GenYoGothic2-B → GenYoGothic2)
zh_HANS: 按 PostScript 名最后一个连字符前的部分合并（GenYoGothic2-B → GenYoGothic2）

msgid: Always group by OpenType typographic/font family name (name table IDs 16/1)
zh_HANS: 始终按 OpenType 族名（名称表 ID 16/1）合并字重

msgid: Group by file name after stripping -Bold, -Light, and similar suffixes
zh_HANS: 按文件名合并，并剥离 -Bold、-Light 等字落后缀

msgid: Use the OpenType family name (prefers localized CJK names when available)
zh_HANS: 使用 OpenType 族名（优先显示可用的中文/日文等本地化名称）

msgid: Use the full font name from the name table
zh_HANS: 使用 name table 中的完整字体名

msgid: How large each font preview appears in the sidebar list
zh_HANS: 侧边栏列表中每条字体预览的显示大小

msgid: Maximum point size used when rendering the thumbnail image
zh_HANS: 渲染缩略图时使用的最大字号

msgid: Font preview cache cleared — rebuilding thumbnails
zh_HANS: 字体预览缓存已清除，正在重建缩略图

msgid: Show rendered font thumbnails beside each name in the font list
zh_HANS: 在字体列表名称旁显示渲染预览图

msgid: Apply the highlighted list font to the text object while navigating the list
zh_HANS: 在列表中切换选中项时，将字体实时应用到文本对象

msgid: Characters rendered inside each font thumbnail
zh_HANS: 渲染在缩略图里的字符

msgid: Use characters from the active text object
zh_HANS: 使用当前文本对象中的文字
使用下方自定义预览文字

msgid: Use the font file display name
Point size used when rendering the thumbnail image
zh_HANS: 生成缩略图时使用的字号

msgid: Generated preview image width in pixels
Generated preview image height in pixels
How large previews appear in the sidebar font list
zh_HANS: 侧边栏字体列表中预览图的显示大小

msgid: How large the preview banner appears above the font list
zh_HANS: 字体列表上方预览条的显示大小

msgid: Built-in font preview not supported yet
zh_HANS: 内置字体暂不支持预览

msgid: Clear cached thumbnails and rebuild them with current preview settings
zh_HANS: 清除缓存并按当前设置重新生成缩略图

msgid: Open a 3D Viewport and try again
zh_HANS: 请打开 3D 视口后重试

msgid: Font browser cannot open in the current context
zh_HANS: 当前环境无法打开字体浏览器

msgid: Tip: set default folder in Edit → Preferences → File Paths → Data
zh_HANS: 提示：可在 编辑 → 偏好设置 → 文件路径 → 数据 中设置默认字体目录

msgid: Load a .ttf/.otf font from disk (e.g. Windows Fonts folder) and assign it to the text
zh_HANS: 从磁盘加载 .ttf/.otf 字体（如 Windows 字体文件夹）并应用到文字

msgid: Open or close the viewport GPU font picker
zh_HANS: 打开或关闭视口 GPU 字体选择器
{:d} 个支持字体 · □ = 缺失字形

msgid: Only list font families that have more than one weight on disk
zh_HANS: 仅列出磁盘上有多种字重的字族

msgid: Open or close the viewport font weight picker
zh_HANS: 打开或关闭视口字体字重选择器

msgid: No alternate weights found for this font

zh_HANS: 无法获取字体字重信息
正在筛选不支持的字族…（已显示 {:d} 个）

msgid: Double-click text in the viewport to edit
zh_HANS: 在视口中双击文字即可编辑

msgid: Double-click empty space to exit edit mode
zh_HANS: 编辑模式下双击空白处退出

msgid: Show the floating toolbar for this text object in the viewport
zh_HANS: 在视口中显示此文字对象的浮动工具栏

msgid: Hide the floating toolbar for this text object
zh_HANS: 隐藏此文字对象的浮动工具栏

msgid: Show the green layout frame overlay for this text object
zh_HANS: 显示此文字对象的绿色排版框叠加层

msgid: Show or hide the green layout frame overlay
zh_HANS: 显示或隐藏绿色排版框叠加层
进入视口内文字编辑模式

msgid: Active object is not a text object
zh_HANS: 当前对象不是文字对象

msgid: Select a text object or open add-on preferences
zh_HANS: 请选择文字对象，或打开插件偏好设置

msgid: Adjust text shear (↺ resets to preset default)
zh_HANS: 调整切变（↺ 恢复为预设默认值）

msgid: Adjust strikethrough line position (↺ resets to default)
zh_HANS: 调整删除线位置（↺ 恢复默认）
拖动以移动工具栏位置

msgid: Show or hide layout frame bounds
zh_HANS: 显示或隐藏排版框边界

msgid: Adjust font size (↺ resets to preset default)
zh_HANS: 调整字号（↺ 恢复为预设默认值）

msgid: Adjust character spacing (↺ resets to preset default)
zh_HANS: 调整字距（↺ 恢复为预设默认值）

msgid: Adjust word spacing (↺ resets to preset default)
zh_HANS: 调整词距（↺ 恢复为预设默认值）

msgid: Adjust line height (↺ resets to preset default)
zh_HANS: 调整行高（↺ 恢复为预设默认值）

msgid: Adjust paragraph spacing (↺ resets to preset default)
zh_HANS: 调整段落间距（↺ 恢复为预设默认值）

msgid: Strikethrough is not supported by Blender text objects
zh_HANS: Blender 文字对象不支持删除线

msgid: Strikethrough is not supported by Blender text objects
zh_HANS: Blender 文字对象不支持删除线

msgid: Clear cached thumbnails and rebuild them with current preview settings
zh_HANS: 清除缓存并按当前设置重新生成缩略图

msgid: Reset font size or spacing to the current style preset default
zh_HANS: 将字号或间距重置为当前样式预设默认值

msgid: Open or close the viewport GPU style preset picker
zh_HANS: 打开或关闭视口 GPU 样式预设选择器

msgid: Transform text to default, uppercase, or lowercase
zh_HANS: 将文字转换为默认、全大写或全小写

msgid: Load a .ttf/.otf font from disk and assign it to the text
zh_HANS: 从磁盘加载 .ttf/.otf 字体并应用到文字

msgid: Show the floating toolbar near selected text in the 3D viewport
zh_HANS: 在 3D 视口中于选中文字附近显示浮动工具栏

msgid: Apply the highlighted font while hovering or navigating the font list
zh_HANS: 在列表中悬停或浏览时将高亮字体实时应用到文字

msgid: What to render inside the thumbnail
User drag offset for the floating toolbar (screen pixels)
zh_HANS: 浮动工具栏的用户拖动偏移（屏幕像素）

msgid: Only list fonts that contain every non-space character in the preview text
zh_HANS: 仅列出预览文字中每个非空格字符都有字形的字体

msgid: Expanded slider row below the floating toolbar
zh_HANS: 浮动工具栏下方展开的滑块行

msgid: Custom preview phrase shown in the viewport font picker
zh_HANS: 视口字体选择器中显示的自定义预览文字

msgid: Letter case transform for the text content
zh_HANS: 文字内容的字母大小写转换

msgid: Stored original text before case transform
zh_HANS: 大小写转换前保存的原始文字

msgid: Horizontal rows or vertical columns (transposed in body)
zh_HANS: 横向行或竖向列（在正文中转置存储）

msgid: Where the first typed column appears; Enter adds the next column
zh_HANS: 首列出现位置；回车添加下一列

msgid: Horizontal input in N-panel: each line is one vertical column
zh_HANS: N 面板横向输入：每行对应一个竖列

msgid: Logical underline toggle (mutually exclusive with strikethrough)
zh_HANS: 逻辑下划线开关（与删除线互斥）

msgid: Logical strikethrough toggle (mutually exclusive with underline)
zh_HANS: 逻辑删除线开关（与下划线互斥）

msgid: Vertical line position used when strikethrough is enabled
zh_HANS: 启用删除线时的线条垂直位置
伪加粗放大前保存的字号

msgid: First line is rightmost; Enter adds a column to the left
zh_HANS: 首行在最右列；回车向左新增列

msgid: First line is leftmost; Enter adds a column to the right
zh_HANS: 首行在最左列；回车向右新增列

msgid: Text Helper is not ready yet
Default visible line count for the N-panel textbox (you can still drag the bottom edge to resize)
zh_HANS: N 面板文本框默认可见行数（仍可拖动底边调整大小）

msgid: Add a new text object in the 3D viewport with optional layout frame
zh_HANS: 在 3D 视口中添加新文本对象，可选自动创建排版框

msgid: Clear all characters from the active text object
zh_HANS: 清空当前文本对象的所有字符

msgid: Replace text content with the system clipboard
zh_HANS: 用系统剪贴板内容替换文本

msgid: Load text from a .txt file into the active text object
zh_HANS: 从 .txt 文件导入文本到当前文本对象

msgid: Switch between horizontal and vertical text layout
zh_HANS: 切换横排或竖排文本布局

msgid: Set whether new vertical columns are added left or right
zh_HANS: 设置竖排新列添加在左侧还是右侧

msgid: Start a new column in vertical text layout
zh_HANS: 在竖排布局中开始新列

msgid: Apply a typography preset to font size, spacing, and alignment
zh_HANS: 应用排版预设（字号、间距和对齐）

msgid: Open Blender's font browser when the 3D View context is required
zh_HANS: 在需要 3D 视图上下文时打开 Blender 字体浏览器

msgid: Restore the default Bfont when no custom font is linked
zh_HANS: 未链接自定义字体时恢复默认 Bfont

msgid: Toggle bold, italic, underline, or strikethrough on selected text
zh_HANS: 切换所选文本的粗体、斜体、下划线或删除线

msgid: Set horizontal text alignment (left, center, right, or justify)
zh_HANS: 设置水平对齐（左、居中、右或两端对齐）

msgid: Set vertical text alignment within the object bounds
zh_HANS: 设置文本在对象范围内的垂直对齐

msgid: Increase or decrease character, word, line, or paragraph spacing
zh_HANS: 增大或减小字距、词距、行距或段距

msgid: Set font size, spacing, shear, or strikethrough position to an exact value
zh_HANS: 将字号、间距、倾斜或删除线位置设为精确值

msgid: Add a layout frame for wrapping and truncating text
zh_HANS: 添加排版框以换行或截断文本

msgid: Toggle text overflow between clip and expand to fit
zh_HANS: 在裁剪溢出与扩展适应之间切换

msgid: Run the viewport HUD modal handler for toolbar and pickers
zh_HANS: 运行视口 HUD 模态处理器（工具栏与选择器）

msgid: Ensure the HUD modal operator is running
zh_HANS: 确保 HUD 模态操作符正在运行

msgid: Filter the font list by script or language
zh_HANS: 按书写系统或语言筛选字体列表

msgid: Show formatting controls in the 3D viewport top header when a text object is selected
zh_HANS: 选中文字对象时在 3D 视口顶栏显示排版控件

msgid: Font size for selected text objects

zh_HANS: 字距偏移（0 表示样式预设值）
词距偏移（0 表示样式预设值）

msgid: Text shear for selected text objects
Preview fonts while hovering the header font or weight list
zh_HANS: 悬停顶栏字体或字重列表时预览字体

msgid: Add or remove this font family from favorites
zh_HANS: 将此字体族加入或移出收藏

msgid: Only list font families marked as favorites
zh_HANS: 仅列出已收藏的字体族

msgid: Only list OpenType variable font files
zh_HANS: 仅列出 OpenType 可变字体文件
顶栏字体选择器悬停预览

msgid: JSON list of favorite font family keys
zh_HANS: 收藏字体族键名的 JSON 列表

msgid: Show every font family, including those missing characters from the preview text
zh_HANS: 显示全部字体族，包括预览文字中缺字的字体

msgid: Show all font families, including single-weight families
zh_HANS: 显示全部字体族，包括只有一种字重的字体族

msgid: Show all font families, not just favorites
zh_HANS: 显示全部字体族，不仅限于收藏

msgid: Show all font types, including static and variable fonts
zh_HANS: 显示全部字体类型，包括静态字体与可变字体

msgid: Add or remove this font family from favorites
zh_HANS: 将此字体族加入或移出收藏

msgid: Show recently applied font families first. Click to cycle sort order.
zh_HANS: 优先显示最近使用的字体族。点击切换排序方式。

msgid: Sort fonts by name ascending. Click to cycle sort order.
zh_HANS: 按名称升序排列。点击切换排序方式。

msgid: Sort fonts by name descending. Click to cycle sort order.
zh_HANS: 按名称降序排列。点击切换排序方式。

msgid: Adjust font size (↺ reset · click value to type)
zh_HANS: 调整字号（↺ 重置 · 点击数值输入）

msgid: Adjust character spacing (↺ reset · click value to type)
zh_HANS: 调整字距（↺ 重置 · 点击数值输入）

msgid: Adjust word spacing (↺ reset · click value to type)
zh_HANS: 调整词距（↺ 重置 · 点击数值输入）

msgid: Adjust line height (↺ reset · click value to type)
zh_HANS: 调整行高（↺ 重置 · 点击数值输入）

msgid: Adjust text shear (↺ reset · click value to type)
zh_HANS: 调整切变（↺ 重置 · 点击数值输入）

msgid: Too many characters ({:d}) — performance may be reduced.
zh_HANS: 字数过多（{:d} 字）— 性能可能下降。

msgid: Reached the configured character limit ({:d} characters).
zh_HANS: 已达设置的最大字数上限（{:d} 字）。

msgid: Type to filter fonts (native field, supports IME / Chinese input)
zh_HANS: 输入以筛选字体（原生输入框，支持 IME / 中文输入）
搜索字体（支持 IME 输入）
请先打开一个 3D 视图

msgid: Return this text object's floating toolbar to its default position
zh_HANS: 将此文本对象的浮动工具栏恢复到默认位置

msgid: How font names appear in lists, the font picker, HUD, and header toolbar
zh_HANS: 字体名称在列表、字体选择器、HUD 和顶部栏工具中显示的方式

msgid: JSON list of recently applied font family keys
zh_HANS: 最近使用字体族键的 JSON 列表

msgid: Keep the floating toolbar this many pixels away from the 3D viewport edges (N/T panels shrink the usable area automatically)
zh_HANS: 浮动工具栏与 3D 视口边缘保持的像素距离（N/T 面板会自动缩小可用区域）

msgid: Legacy HUD drag offset (migrated to the text object; not used for new data)
zh_HANS: 旧版 HUD 拖动偏移（已迁移到文字对象；新数据不再使用）

msgid: Show formatting controls in the 3D Viewport header when a text object is selected
zh_HANS: 选择文字对象时，在 3D 视口顶部栏显示格式控件

msgid: User explicitly enabled the floating toolbar while auto-show is off
zh_HANS: 关闭自动显示时，用户已明确启用浮动工具栏

msgid: Font refresh complete — preview thumbnails are rebuilding
zh_HANS: 字体刷新完成——正在重建预览缩略图

msgid: Font refresh complete — preview thumbnails are rebuilding
zh_HANS: 字体刷新完成——正在重建预览缩略图

msgid: Use the OpenType family name (default; prefers localized CJK names when available)
zh_HANS: 使用 OpenType 字体族名称（默认；优先使用本地化 CJK 名称）

msgid: Clear persisted font-name metadata and rebuild it in the background
zh_HANS: 清除已保存的字体名称元数据，并在后台重建

msgid: Clear persisted font-name metadata and rebuild it in the background
zh_HANS: 清除已保存的字体名称元数据，并在后台重建

msgid: Font search index cleared — rebuilding in background
zh_HANS: 字体搜索索引已清除——正在后台重建

msgid: Font search index cleared — rebuilding in background
zh_HANS: 字体搜索索引已清除——正在后台重建
字体搜索索引：已缓存 {:d} 项
